item.title: 3:32 pm, April 26, 2026
item.description: Looks a little bit more in keeping with the rest of the mini?

media:content.media:description: The first full body shot of Not Gotrek that we’ve seen in a while. His hair has been (temporarily) removed so that the reverse of the axe can be tacked to the wrong shoulder and viewed in comparison with the rest of the painting. Some initial reflections have been added to the tiny pieces of shiny chest armour actually visible beneath his massive beard. Eventually the two styles should hopefully match and unify the appearance a little. Ignore the very WIP badly drawn doggo heads on his arm please. Those aren’t for you.

item.title: 3:14 pm, April 26, 2026
item.description: A bit of tidying today, smoothing some of the worst colour blends. I’ve added a bit of yellow at hard transition lines in an attempt to suggest that the Actual Human Sun might be directly glinting on those edges, discrete from bright sky and ground reflections.

media:content.media:description: A new shot of Axe Pal on its holder. It still has fairly abrupt value transitions, which I believe is the secret sauce of non-metallics, but white-to-blue-to-black are more smoothly blended. Some yellow and yellow-white has tentatively been added where blade edges transition to flat body elements, with some pure white added at the brightest point and dotted in little detail lines to suggest scratches. The dragons remain indifferent.

item.title: 9:02 pm, April 25, 2026
item.description: It’s weirdly satisfying to see that the Wikipedia entry for Twin Peaks has five entries for genre, with six footnotes.

item.title: 6:48 pm, April 25, 2026
item.description:
Boop the paint at random, make a horrified face, glaze it away until the tears stop.

Pro strats, hobby pals, as we attempt something less cartoony on the rear face of the axe.

media:content.media:description: A (frankly massive) half-painted miniature axe in a mess of sketchy greens and blues representing the lower and upper facing portions of blade, respectively. The painted reflections don’t make a lot of sense, geometry-wise, but we’re chasing ‘should not look like a frame from Roger Rabbit’ more than ‘reality’ at this point. The blades are held in place by little (bronze?) ‘metallic’ dragons picked out in shades of brown.

item.title: 1:14 pm, April 24, 2026
item.description: It got away from me a bit there.

item.title: 1:13 pm, April 24, 2026
item.description:
Lawnmower man -> every phone ring in unisonSpring man -> every lawnmower in unison

(Therefore, Socrates is mortal).

item.title: 9:31 pm, April 18, 2026
item.description:
Random screenshot discovered in my camera roll from 2018.

Spoiler alert: he definitely did.

media:content.media:description: A Google search prompt: Did Hastings from Poirot once punch a man into a river? “About 33,900 results”.

item.title: 2:36 pm, April 18, 2026
item.description: Finding myself with some purples and reds still on the palette and the long-abandoned Spooky Lady within arm’s reach, I’m randomly trying to improve this older coloured NMM attempt by boosting contrast.

media:content.media:description: A Spooky Lady recap! This is a miniature display bust of a veiled and crowned undead lady in heavy spiked armour. Only two sets of colours are currently in use: the armour is picked out in purples and pinks while her veil, scarf and sash share the same red tones. Extreme highlights are placed to suggest that the purple surfaces are ‘shiny’. A small cast shadow from one of the spikes has been painted over the scarf to help imply directional light.

item.title: 12:27 pm, April 16, 2026
item.description: I’ve just seen a bin lorry that’s actually a lorry carrying bins. I’m not sure I have the ontology for this.

item.title: 3:19 pm, April 13, 2026
item.description: Clearly there are different strata of worms, though they flow through and around each other erratically.

item.title: 3:18 pm, April 13, 2026
item.description: “I don’t think we have cans anymore, it’s just a sea of worms”, from the set of things I have typed stoically into work chats.

item.title: 8:15 pm, April 6, 2026
item.description: “Neil, you are dark on the rock, mission is a go” - reminded by Artemis II of the moon heist film that we never actually got that was weirdly just a five minute sequence in an unrelated Michael Bay film.

media:content.media:description: The freshly-unpacked jet black sleeve box of Absolute Watchmen with its bright yellow clock face.

item.title: 6:05 pm, April 5, 2026
item.description: What’s particularly irritating about this photo is that I can now clearly see, after having painted it, exactly where I haven’t properly cleaned the sprue connection point on Pipe Bug’s Big Hand.

item.title: 6:00 pm, April 5, 2026
item.description: Just two pals, pallin’ around.

media:content.media:description: 🎵 Pipe Bug and Bug Lady, sitting in a tree… 🎵

item.title: 5:29 pm, April 5, 2026
item.description: Hey, look at me, un-abandoning a thing! I really like the dark desaturated purple and red I ended up with as a base on the big bug, so I’m glazing the same mix over the clashing too-vibrant versions here (while I remember what they are).

media:content.media:description: It’s the Bug Lady (totally not a bug)! Her red frock is a lot less red in the shadows, her purple boots knocked _way_ down in the highlight. I may actually be continuing with this one!

item.title: 1:16 pm, April 5, 2026
item.description: Imperceptible little increments.

media:content.media:description: Some parts may be _slightly_ pinker, some slightly not as purple any more. Is dark red a possibility? Who amongst us can even say for sure? A surprising number of paint tubes (not even used here) and grip-tape-wrapped brushes are also visible. More than a normal number.

item.title: 11:49 am, April 5, 2026
item.description: Wonder Man is pretty great. I wish more of the Marvel stuff was that low-key.

item.title: 1:30 pm, April 3, 2026
item.description: Little boops of highlight on his mittens and spiky hat.

media:content.media:description: Attempting to make the spiky bits look spikier using orange-into-yellow edge highlights. A couple of tiny, pure white dots have been added to the tips of the uppermost-facing points.

item.title: 12:50 pm, April 3, 2026
item.description: Can’t completely stay away from those reds I don’t see properly.

media:content.media:description: A red-yellow tongue and some matching fingernails join a slightly smoothed-out pink-purple face blend with similar skin-tones applied to one hand.
